titleStmt.title: SII 7.323: original edition by K.V. Subrahmanya Aiyer
No. 323. (A.R. No. 133 of 1901). ON A SLAB LYING IN THE HOUSE OF SUBBANNA-ADIGAL IN THE SAME VILLAGE.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
gaṇādhipatayē namaḥ.namastuṁgaśiraścuṁbicaṁdracāmaracāravē . trailōkyanagarāra
ṁbhamūlastaṁbhāya śaṁbhavē . svasti śrī . jayādbhudaya kaliyuga prathamapāda dalu
raṁ 4504 śrī śālivāhanana śakavaruṣa 1324 saṁdu va¨rttamāna citrabhānu saṁvatsarada caitra ba 5 gu-lu
śrīmanmahārājādhirāja rājaparamēśvara śrī vīrapratāpa hariharamahārāyarū vijayarājyābhyudayadali
śrīmanmahāpradhānaṁ basavaṁṇavoḍeyarū bārakūrarājyavanu pālisuvalli bārakūra vatsāsāhuvina mo
ṁmakkaḷu malladēvasāhugaḷū ṭhakurasisāhuvina moṁmakkaḷu narasiṁhaṭhakurarū mūṟukēriya kāmyadē
vara saṁnidheyalū tāU māḍida tsatrakke kiṟupūḍiya vasavaṁṇaheggaḍeya keyyalū tānu mūlava koṁḍa
Aḷuvina mūlikara kāhu mēhu hola nela modalāḷkeya staḷada causīme saṁbaṁdhamellavanū
nū dhārāpū¨rvakavāgi yeṟadu koṭṭaru Ā staḷacatussīmeya vivara mūḍalu bayalaguṁḍiyanū
makkiyiṁdaṁ paḍuvalu vottina haṇasina seṭiya toḷaḷiṁdaṁ mūḍalu kaṁciseṭiya gōḍeyiṁdaṁ teṁkalu
ḍana bāḷiṁdaṁ baḍagalu yiṁtī catussīmeya holanelanoḷaguḷḷa bāḷina vivara bayalaguṁḍiya gaddehā
ḷa bittuva bede nāgaṁḍugadalū mū 3 A gaddeya keḷagaṇa koṁbaḷagadde bittuva bede nāgaṁḍugadalū mū 10 A
lliṁdaṁ keḷagaṇakeṟeya kaṭṭina gadde bittuva bede nāgaṁḍugadalū mū5 Ā gaddeya mēlaṇa beṭṭiya hādi bi
ttuva bede nāgaṁḍugadalu mū 3 Aṁtu bayalu bittuva bede nāgaṁḍugadalū mū 20 yiṁtī catussīme mūḍalu hai
vagaddeya gaḍiyiṁdaṁ paḍuvalukēriya baḷiya mārakaveyadēvaru naṁdana bāḷiṁdaṁ mūḍalu teṁkalu dēvaru
mādamārakaveya tana jinagaddeyiṁdaṁ baḍagalu kōṭināthadēvara dēvasvada kaluku rakka gaḷiṁdaṁ teṁkalu baḍagiya
lu nāgaṁḍugadalū mū 6 dali catussīmeya vivara mūḍalu bāhāṁtana bāḷiṁdaṁ
ṁdaṁ mūḍalu teṁka sacaṁtana bāḷiṁdaṁ baḍagalu koṁbaṇadaḍigaḷa dēvasvadalu
liṁdaṁ teṁkalu mūḍalagaddeya bayalu bittuva bedagaṇagilu nāgaṁḍugadalu mū 9 Aṁtū catussī
me teṁkalu hoḷeyiṁdaṁ paḍuvalu bāhaṁtana gaḍiyiṁdaṁ teṁkalu harida baccaliṁdaṁ paḍuva
bāḷiṁdaṁ teṁkalu nāgaṁḍugadalu
catussīme mūḍalu biḷaṁbaḷiya kōṭīsaradahana bāḷiṁdaṁ paḍuvalu A kōṭī saradahana bāḷiṁdaṁ mū
ḍalu teṁkalu kōṭīsaradahana makkiyiṁ baḍagalu [U]bhaya baya la gaddebittuva bede nāgaṁ
ḍugadalū mū 4 Ā kūḍaṇamakki nāgaṁḍugadalu mū 1 yī Ayidu catassī me mūḍalu dēvaru
mādamārakaveyana gaddeyiṁ paḍuvalu Aṁṇasidhyana bāḷiṁdaṁ mūḍalu teṁkalu saṁbhaṁ dana beṭi
ṁdaṁ baḍagalu harida bacaliṁ teṁkalu hittila naḍuvagadde 1 kke bittuva bede nāgaṁḍugadalū mū 1 yī
gadde paḍuvalu viradana beṭiṁ mūḍalu teṁkalu guḍiya gaḍiyiṁdaṁ baḍaga
lu koṭīsaradahana baḷeyātana calli ya gaddeyiṁ teṁkalu koḷakiya bayala muḍu baḷigadde bittuva bede nā
gaṁḍugadalū mū 3 catussīmeya vivara mūḍalu lu seṭṭiya gaddeyiṁ paḍuvalu keṟagaddeyiṁ
daṁ mūḍalu teṁkalu Aṁṇappajyana bāḷiyiṁdaṁ baḍagalu Aṁṇa rana bāḷiṁdaṁ teṁkala
ḷaṟeyagadda mūḍe nāgaṁḍugadalu mū 3 ṟa A catussīme mūḍalu kallagaddeyiṁ paḍuvalu
cauḷeyana baḷigaddeyiṁ mūḍalu teṁkalu harida bacaliṁ baḍagalu mūḍaṇa bāḷiyiṁ teṁkalu
Uḷa gadeya bayala bittuva bede nāgaṁḍugadalū mū 3 ṟa gade mūḍalu laya
riya bāḷiṁ paḍuvalu ṭiyana bāḷiṁdaṁ mūḍalu teṁkalu bā bāḷiṁdaṁ pa
ḍuvalu bāhāṁtana yaḷuveyoḷagaṇa koḷakeya bayalu bittuva bede nāgaṁḍugadalū
mū 2 Ā gadde mūḍaṇa ṁṇana bāḷiṁ paḍuvalū Ajjapakulukurana bāḷiṁ mūḍalu teṁkalu
teṁkabayalu bittuva bede nāgaṁḍugadalū
mū 3 ra gadde bhaṁḍāriya gadeyiṁ paḍuvelu
ya bāḷiṁ mūḍalu
bayalu bittuva bede nāgaṁḍugadalū
mū 5
ttuva bede nāgaṁḍugadalū
bayalu
bayalu baḷiyiṁda
bāḷiṁda
keṟiya
yaṁ A mū 4
teru doḷage
Ā hegaḍi bāḷi khaṁḍikakke teṁkalallikālaṁprati va¨rṣaba
niṁ kā ga 15 hērige r 4 kiṭṭuḍiya
muḷavaṁdābāḷiṁdaṁ hērige r 4 nāraṇavakyāraniṁ
rige ga 1 . Avaluhe ga 1 . japa kalukuraniṁ ga 5 . Aṁṇakalukarani
tsa nāraṇaniṁ dēvara r 4 hā 7 ḷiya nāraṇaniṁdēvara ga 41 gaṁdhakeṟeyanī dēvarige
mane brāhmarige ga 6 . Avalu hā 30 Aḷuvintiya kuṁṭeya gadde ya mēleṇa
kōṭīsara harahāyakura bayalu makkeyamēle ga 20 kōṭīsara me ga
ddeyalū muddaseṭiya dā gadeyalū kalkuradeṟu bhatta mū 5 Aṁttu ga 5 . 1 bha yaṁkalkura
teṟu ga 18 . 1 bhata mū 5 Ā hegaḍeya jananakkī meraḍu varuśakoṁme naḍava be
kaṁ baḷigiya kallagaddemēle ga 2 . 2 Aṁṇasapajyana koraḍina bayalemēle ga 6 viradana beṭṭina mēle
ga 6 r 1 Alāḷaseṭiya geya makkiya mēle ga 1 r 1 beṁmaṇakeregaṭiṁ bāḷiya makki ya hāne ṭhāvi
na mēle ga 2 hosaba yanahuvena hāḷiya tere ga 1 kaṁnekaveyana bāgilagadeya mēle ga 1 r 1
hoveggaḍeya biruḷa ddeya mēle ga 1 . 1 . Aṁttūbeḍuṁgūḷu ga 16 . Akhaṁḍa
sōḍiyahabbakke ṇike cakeya karagida tupa hā 1 vuṭiya tu . hā 1 pā ya
ha 2 hoḷa niṁtu mā 2 teṁka bayala vokalamēleṇa mā 2 kōṭīsara radoḍe niṁmamēle
kalukure Aṁtū nitya hā 5 ṟa jananakkuḷa begittuhāla hāleyakaṁ
bittugaḍiya kaṭipamāleya kaṁ ṁna Aneya kuṁṭimīna hāḷe yyadaḍakaḷu hāruve
yanuḷḷa sidhasā(ṁ)dhya holanela nidhinikṣēpa jalapāśāṇayakṣīṇi Āgāmi sidhasādhyayeṁba Aṣṭa
bhōgaThe inscription stops here.
Digital edition of SII 7.323 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
